backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing conversations, messaging, gallery items, and user profiles with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking implemented features to related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Plain-text mapping of frontend file paths to short human-written summaries.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables defining light/dark theme tokens and layout colors.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React root and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, global providers, and app layout structure including authentication gating.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Route guard that redirects unauthenticated users to login and shows a loading screen during identity initialization.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting new authenticated users to enter and save their display name via canister mutation.
frontend/src/components/background/Butte: Generates and animates decorative butterfly SVGs with randomized positions and motion.
Renders labeled bar charts with proportional bar widths and custom colors.
Builds an SVG pie chart from data values and displays a legend.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatCompose: Provides a text input and send button for composing and submitting chat messages.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessage: Displays chat messages with avatars and auto-scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/gallery/GalleryC: Shows a gallery item card with icon, metadata, and view/download buttons.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Renders the top app bar with user profile info and logout menu.
Defines the main app layout with sidebar navigation, header, and background.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Sideb: Provides a vertical navigation menu with route-aware highlighting.
frontend/src/components/video/VideoPrevi: Displays a styled preview of a video draft with animated presentation effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current identity with auto-refetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatSession.ts: Manages chat messages with local storage persistence and canned assistant replies.
frontend/src/hooks/useGalleryItems.ts: Fetches gallery items filtered by type.
frontend/src/hooks/useGalleryPublish.ts: Provides functions to publish photo, video, and analytics items to the gallery.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity loading, login, logout, and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useMakerDraft.ts: Hook for loading, updating, and clearing photo or video maker drafts stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and gallery items via an actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedAnalytics.ts: Stores per-user analytics in localStorage and provides retrieval and append-save functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles, custom CSS variables, animations, and global styling.
frontend/src/lib/analytics/compute.ts: Computes profit metrics and prepares bar and pie chart data from financial form inputs.
frontend/src/lib/chat/cannedReplies.ts: Generates canned chatbot replies based on keywords in the user's message.
frontend/src/lib/poster/renderPosterToCa: Renders a poster onto a canvas using themed gradients and text from a draft object.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point initializing React, query client, and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/BusinessAnalyticsPage: Page for entering financial data, generating analytics, displaying charts, and saving reports.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat interface showing messages, composer, and controls for starting or clearing chats.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays gallery items with tab filters and shows loading, empty, or grid views.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles Internet Identity login and redirects authenticated users to home.
frontend/src/pages/MakerLandingPage.tsx: Landing page linking to photo and video maker workflows with feature cards.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoD: Collects business details for photo posters and saves them to a draft before navigating.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoR: Renders generated poster to canvas and provides download and gallery save options.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoT: Lets users choose a poster theme and updates the draft before generating results.
frontend/src/pages/ShopMakerPage.tsx: Placeholder page announcing upcoming shop builder with feature previews.
frontend/src/pages/video-for-reels/Video: Collects basic business info for video creation and saves it before moving to style selection.
Displays the generated video preview with options to export a preview animation or save the video to the gallery.
Lets users select a video animation style, updates the draft, and navigates to the preview result page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, supporting both query and hash routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, typography, container settings, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing app features, known issues, and versioned requirements for the multi-page web app.
